rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF AUDREY RUTH WARREN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 22, 2017 for proper notice as follows: notice of the amendment was given 10/20 but the amendment was not actually filed until 10/23 (see Local Rule 14.21.A.). Also, a second amendment was filed 10/27. Amendments require full notice (see CRC 7.53). Notice of the amendment and second amendment must be given no later than 11/7 and POS filed no later than 11/15.
